config.llm_guardian.disabled_desc: Enable to add an LLM-based security layer that evaluates tool calls before execution. Uses a fast, cheap model to detect suspicious operations. Falls back to the main LLM if no provider is selected.
config.llm_guardian.provider_desc: Select a provider for the Guardian LLM. A fast, cheap model (e.g. Gemini Flash, GPT-4o-mini, local 3B) is recommended for sub-second decisions.
config.llm_guardian.level_desc: Controls which tool calls are sent to the Guardian for review. Higher levels check more operations but cost more tokens.
config.llm_guardian.level_low: Lรฅg โ€” Endast hรถgriskverktyg (shell, sudo, python)
config.llm_guardian.level_medium: Medium โ€” All tools + external APIs
config.llm_guardian.level_high: Hรถg โ€” Varje verktygsanrop kontrolleras
config.llm_guardian.failsafe_desc: Vad som hรคnder nรคr Guardian LLM inte รคr tillgรคnglig eller returnerar ett fel (timeout, hastighetsgrรคns, etc.).
config.llm_guardian.failsafe_quarantine: Karantรคn โ€” Tillรฅt men logga och varna
config.llm_guardian.failsafe_allow: Tillรฅt โ€” Hoppa รถver kontroll (minst sรคkert)
config.llm_guardian.perf_desc: Cache- och hastighetsbegrรคnsningsinstรคllningar fรถr att kontrollera kostnader och latens.
config.llm_guardian.overrides_desc: Override the protection level for specific tools. Useful to always check dangerous tools or skip safe ones.
config.llm_guardian.clarification_desc: Om aktiverat kan agenten ge en motivering om ett verktygsanrop blockeras. Guardian omvรคrderar begรคran en gรฅng med motiveringen innan ett slutgiltigt beslut fattas.
config.llm_guardian.scan_desc: Use the Guardian LLM to scan incoming content (emails, webhooks) for prompt injection, phishing, and social engineering attacks โ€” beyond the built-in regex patterns.
